closure_proof.proof: Let x = (b_{t+1} - b_t - 1) % m. Since % m returns values in {0,...,m-1}, adding 1 gives {1,...,m}. Round-trip: b_{t+1} = ((b_t + e - 1) % m) + 1 with e = ((b_{t+1} - b_t - 1) % m) + 1 recovers b_{t+1} for all (b_t, b_{t+1}) in {1,...,m}^2. Exhaustively verified for m=9 (81 pairs) and m=24 (576 pairs). QED.

uniqueness_proof.statement: For each (b_t, b_{t+1}), exactly one e_t in {1,...,m} satisfies the QA step equation
uniqueness_proof.proof: The QA step b_{t+1} = ((b_t + e - 1) % m) + 1 is a bijection in e for fixed b_t. Each b_{t+1} is hit by exactly one e. QED.

role_distinction.b_source: quantized signal amplitude at time t
role_distinction.e_source: inferred from consecutive amplitudes via QA step inversion
role_distinction.note: b and e are structurally different: b is observed directly from the signal, e is derived from the transition. Even when b_t = e_t numerically, their roles are distinct per [208] irreducible product principle.

generator_synchrony.definition: For N concurrent time series at time t, synchrony = fraction of series sharing the modal generator value

interpretation.synchrony_1.0: all series have identical generator = singularity coupling

generator_synchrony.cert_207_connection: Maximum synchrony = all generators equal = C = 2*d*e maximized across series = singularity per [207]

empirical_validation.dataset: CHB-MIT 5 patients (chb01, chb02, chb03, chb05, chb06), 329 total windows

feature_directions.generator_entropy: seizure < baseline in most patients — more structured dynamics
feature_directions.generator_synchrony: NOT consistently seizure > baseline (1/5) — distribution shape matters more than cross-channel coordination
feature_directions.note: Discriminative power comes from full feature set (singularity_frac, entropy, mean_f), not synchrony alone

cross_domain.audio: dynamical signals have higher entropy than stochastic — confirms [207] (autocorrelation = singularity)
cross_domain.climate: El Nino lowest generator entropy (1.18); ONI-PDO synchrony 0.633 (6x baseline)
cross_domain.era5: synchrony vs future variability r=-0.063 p=0.0004 (***)
cross_domain.finance: raw r=+0.037 p=0.025 (*); partial ns beyond current vol

empirical_validation.correction: Initial single-patient result (DR2=+0.157) used incorrect formula (off-by-one). Corrected formula gives DR2=+0.051 on chb01 alone, but multi-patient Fisher's p < 10^-6.

supersedes.reason: Generator inference derives (b,e) from signal evolution; hardcoded lookups assign (b,e) by analyst choice. The inferred mapping is canonical and domain-general.

domain_generality.applies_to: any m-valued time series or quantized continuous signal
domain_generality.requirement: sequential data with meaningful amplitude ordering

witnesses.name: constant_signal
witnesses.note: constant signal = singularity generator (e=m=9 = identity, no change)

witnesses.name: unit_step_signal
witnesses.note: uniform stepping = constant generator e=1 (minimal step), cosmos orbit

witnesses.name: eeg_seizure_chb01
witnesses.description: Real EEG seizure window: higher synchrony, lower entropy, more singularity generators
witnesses.note: All features match [207] prediction: seizure = maximum coupling

source_attribution: Will Dale + Claude, 2026-04-08. Insight: 'QA applies to signal analysis. All data is generalizable to graphs. The signal IS the orbit.' Method formalized during EEG observer development session.
